title: Tip of the Loom
description: Adds tooltips to banner pattern buttons in the loom.
body:
This mod adds a tooltip to the pattern selection buttons inside of the loom GUI. These tooltips will tell you the name of the pattern that will be applied, the name of the mod that added the pattern, and even the registry ID of the pattern if advanced tooltips (f3+h) are enabled!

![Preview image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/32IHc3EF/images/dc9e63931d43ee0f29a139e6cb45a350f41c2d33.png)
